iti33:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti33:2.1: “Endowed with two things, monks, a person–as if carried off–is thus placed in heaven.
iti33:2.4: Endowed with these two things, a person–as if carried off–is thus placed in heaven.”
iti33:3.5: at the break-up of the body
